title: /pr Peer Review Round Response
description: Schema for individual agent responses in /pr skill peer review rounds. Round >= 2 requires feedback_addressed (min 2) to enforce mutual feedback.

round.description: Current review round (1-5; 4-5 only when PM score <= 8)

stance.description: Position on the task/proposal under review

key_points.description: Core arguments with evidence (file:line where applicable)

risks.description: Risks or objections raised (critic-agent: key_points + risks >= 2 objections required)

feedback_addressed.description: Responses to other agents' prior-round points (required with minItems 2 from round 2)

consensus_ready.description: true if this agent believes consensus is reached and no further rounds needed
